title: Song: Colours of Seasons
objectives: Reinforce past simple (was/were) and comparative adjectives through song
Practise season and weather vocabulary in a musical context

key_concepts.explanation:
Verse 1: Winter was cooler than summer, / The weather was calm and bright. / We went camping in the desert, / And watched the stars at night.

Chorus: We love the colours of seasons, / Each one is special and great! / We cared for flowers that bloom and grow, / Together — that's our way!

Verse 2: Spring was windier than autumn, / The sky was cloudy and blue. / We had a picnic by the garden, / And shared the work we do.

teaching_notes: This song uses both grammar points from the unit: past simple ('was cooler', 'was calm', 'went camping', 'watched', 'was windier') and comparative adjectives ('cooler than', 'windier than'). It also includes season activities (camping, watching stars, picnic, garden). Good for whole-class singing and movement.
